name: Gluten-Free Mock Rye Bread (for Bread Machine
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Xanthan gum or guar gum
recipeInstructions:
1. Follow the manufacturer's instructions for your bread machine.
2. Select the single rise setting on your machine.
3. After baking, wrap the bread in a towel and let it cool completely for about 4 hours.
4. Slice the cooled bread thinly using an electric knife.
5. Store any remaining slices in the refrigerator or freeze them for later use.
6. To reheat frozen slices, microwave them for approximately 30 seconds each.
This gluten-free rye bread is a favorite among many of my non-celiac guests who prefer it over homemade whole wheat bread.
